summary: Refresh rust-diffforge workspace opening and settings UI with compact Diffforge desktop styling and replace manual terminal count entry with a visual 1-12 layout picker.

review_items.summary: Workspace rail rows become denser open-workspace controls with visible runtime/status metadata and a separate compact settings icon action.
Workspace settings use a slimmer operational modal with concise workspace identity, root directory, runtime/default actions, and local-only terminal controls.
The manual terminal number input is replaced by buttons for counts 1 through 12, each showing a small layout preview generated from the same react-resizable-panels row/column layout logic.
Local workspace terminal count is bounded from 1 to 12 instead of 1 to 16, and existing saved values above 12 normalize down to 12.
Desktop auth, billing gates, hosted workspace API contracts, SQL/database schema, terminal PTY bridge, and native resize commands remain unchanged.

rules: Workspace terminal count must be selected through fixed UI buttons for counts 1 through 12.
Workspace terminal count normalization must reject values below one and clamp values above twelve.
Each terminal count option should include a compact visual preview of the row and column layout produced by the existing react-resizable-panels layout rules.
Workspace settings remain local desktop UI for terminal count and root directory; no database column or hosted API contract may be added for these values.
Workspace opening controls should remain compact and operational, keeping the terminal surface visually dominant.
Workspace settings and opening UI changes must preserve existing session validation, root-directory validation, workspace ownership checks, telemetry calls, and terminal cleanup behavior.

patches.summary: Clamp terminal count to 12, render the workspace rail metadata, and replace the number input with a visual terminal-count picker.
Update workspace rail/settings styles and add terminal count picker plus mini layout preview styles.
Clamp shared terminal index normalization helpers to 12 visible terminals.

compatibility.notes: Local desktop UI behavior only. Existing local settings with terminal counts above 12 are normalized to 12; auth, billing, API, SQL, and native terminal contracts are unchanged.
